<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Current objects:")
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['id'] == 0: continue
    print(f"  id={node['id']}, color={node['color']}, pixels={node['pixels']}")

ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print(f"\nTop bar: {ascii_lines[0][15:47]}")

# Print key area
print("\n=== Key area ===")
for i in range(10, 55):
    if i < len(ascii_lines):
        line = ascii_lines[i][30:60]
        if any(c in line for c in 'WNRGS'):
            print(f"{i:3d}: {line}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
